CONTENT.Club career: Vidal played youth football for SC Orange. In November 2017, he signed a professional contract with Montpellier. He made his professional debut with the club on 4 December 2019 in a 2–2 draw away to Dijon.On 1 July 2022, Vidal permanently signed for Ajaccio following a loan spell at the club.

SUMMARY: Clément Vidal (born 18 June 2000) is a French professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for  Ligue 2 club Ajaccio.
